# 📦 Installation

### Required

- [AzureLib Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib-armor "")
- [Runes](https://modrinth.com/mod/runes "")
- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine "")

### Strongly recommended
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat "") for proper weapon mechanics

# 🧙🏻‍♂️ Features

This project adds RPG-style combat focused skill sets—commonly known as classes—, introducing different variants of the wizard archetype (inspired by World of Warcraft).

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/6c6eba9f44fc6080fe2c16cb2be4a5b99e0367bc.jpeg)

## Getting started

Obtain a **Wands** or **Staff**, these all have a basic spell attached.

**Runes** serve as ammunition for casted spells (much like arrows for bows). [More information about crafting runes.](https://modrinth.com/mod/runes)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/39afb3b18181624831b76d6bfed6c5cdbf45a9fc.jpeg)

## Spell Books

Become a true Wizard by creating a Spell Book, and unlocking all of its powerful spells!

To do it, find a Spell Binding Table in village [Gazebos](https://modrinth.com/mod/gazebos), or build your own (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table).

To use the spell books: equip them and hold a weapon!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/2e8800c99b49e28ea8278bb390577d656339c19f.jpeg)

### Tome of Arcane

Offers focused arcane spells, best used against solitary or closely gathered opponents.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/8e51ab139b363cbe52abdad30892685932c6b625.jpeg)

### Tome of Fire

Offers rampant fire spells, best used to deal damage at large areas.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/25aee01930aa2a392852a4267463fa3b9958bf97.jpeg)

### Tome of Frost

Offers chilling frost spells, best used to damage enemies, hinder their movement, and shield yourself.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/c6e273d96710a548fa80d6b06b2719a86f93632a.jpeg)

## Wizard equipment

Explore craftable equipment, boosting the power and speed of your spells:

*   material tiered wizard robes of various kinds
*   material tiered staves and wands

Equipment bonuses are configureable in `config/wizards/items.json`.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/61ef30da97ba6512b0b28a32a18d3393f88bec83.jpeg)

## Magical enchantments

Unlock powerful enchantments for spell casting, for example:

**Spell Infinity** to cast spells without Rune cost

**Spell Power** to increase spell damage in general

**Spell Haste** to increase spell casting speed

Discover even more in-game! Use [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)!

Enchantments are configureable in `config/spell_power/enchantments.json`.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/b1754a68b9039fcc30bdbe81598f3c657708dfd1.jpeg)

## Extended dungeon loot

Find magic equipment in dungeon loot chests!

Loot table injections are configurable in `config/rpg_series/loot.json`.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/0d99fe174849dd6ff6482347503253f99a435ac7.jpeg)

## New village structures

Find Wizard Towers in villages, where Wizard Merchant villagers sell magic equipment!

The spawn weight and limit are configureable in `config/wizards/villages.json`.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NkGaQMDA/images/1af0e9a6f9fa84c97318dc5d0f087a8823ad8ab3.jpeg)

# 🔧 Configuration

Spell casting mechanics and HUD can be configured under **Mod Menu / Spell Engine / Settings**.

All spells are defined in data files, hence customisable via data packs. Find the original data files in the project source linked to this page.

Item attributes of wizard equipment, chest loot chances, village structure generation can be configured by changing config JSON files under `config/wizards/`
